raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Complaint Against American Express Denied Refund for Booking Error Summary of Issue : On XX/XX/year>, I booked a round-trip flight from XXXX to XXXX for XXXX travelers using XXXX Membership Rewards points * * ( equivalent to {$6500.00} ) through American Express Travel . The travel date was XX/XX/year>. 

Upon arrival at our connecting airport in XXXX XXXX, we were informed by XXXX XXXX that due to a booking glitch by American Express, we could not board our connecting flight. Our checked luggage was already en route to XXXX, leaving us without food, clothing, or medication. We spent over XXXX hours in the airport trying to resolve the issue through calls with XXXX XXXX and American Express agents. 

An American Express agent eventually acknowledged the error and rebooked our travel, charging us an additional {$7500.00} to our American Express card. We were assured that the duplicate charges would be refunded and that any out-of-pocket expenses would be reimbursed. 

Despite these assurances, our dispute was denied, and we have received no compensation. This has resulted in financial harm and emotional distress for my family. 

Resolution Requested : - A full refund of the duplicate charges made on XX/XX/year> - Reimbursement for documented expenses incurred due to the delay Supporting Documentation : - Booking references : # XXXX, # XXXX, # XXXX  - Transaction records I am seeking fair treatment and resolution consistent with consumer protection standards. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
